items.summary: In the WebsiteLayoutPanel component, modify the local time display to append the UTC offset in the format '(UTC +X)' or '(UTC -X)' where X is the timezone offset. For example, 'February 24, 2026 at 9:11 AM (UTC +8)'. Apply this change to the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/strong[2], which displays the local time for the default search location.
